meta.title: About SGS | International Clean Energy Advisory
meta.description: Meet the SGS team and learn how we support your renewable energy and water infrastructure decisions.

hero.title: A trusted partner for critical decisions.
hero.text: Since 2015, we have helped clients plan and deliver energy and water infrastructure with clear advice and dependable execution support.

intro.title: Experienced, practical, client-focused.
intro.text: We combine strategy and technical depth so you can align stakeholders, reduce risk, and move projects forward with confidence.

pillars.title: Help you turn sustainable infrastructure ideas into bankable projects.
Accelerate resilient energy and water systems across growth markets.
Work as one team with you—clear advice, transparent communication, measurable outcomes.

market_focus.title: Regional focus. International reach.
market_focus.text: We work across GCC and MENA and connect you to trusted specialists in Europe and Asia Pacific when needed.

cards.title: Strategy with depth
cards.text: We connect commercial goals to technical realities from day one.

cards.title: Collaborative delivery
cards.text: We work closely with your internal team and external partners.

cards.title: Cross-sector expertise
cards.text: Renewables, water, desalination, and EPC interfaces under one roof.

cards.title: Long-term perspective
cards.text: We support decisions that stay effective through execution and operations.

team.title: Meet the people behind your project success.

leadership.name: Amina Farouk
leadership.summary: Leads SGS strategy and client partnerships with 18+ years in renewable infrastructure and PPP program delivery.

leadership.name: David Kim
leadership.summary: Oversees project governance, delivery standards, and cross-border coordination for complex energy and water portfolios.

management.name: Sara Al-Hassan
management.summary: Guides utility-scale solar programs from feasibility through procurement and partner alignment.

management.name: Omar Rahman
management.summary: Leads treatment, reuse, and desalination advisory programs for municipal and industrial clients.

advisors.name: Helen Moore
advisors.summary: Supports project structuring and funding strategy with deep experience in blended finance and institutional partnerships.

advisors.name: Dr. Nabil Idris
advisors.summary: Advises on RO performance strategy, reliability planning, and long-term asset optimization.

founders.name: Khaled Mansour
founders.summary: Founded SGS to bridge strategic advisory and implementation support across regional sustainability priorities.

founders.name: Leila Haddad
founders.summary: Co-founded SGS with a focus on client-centric delivery, capability building, and trusted long-term partnerships.

cta.title: Let’s plan your next step together.
